Short title and Commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Armed Forces Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2011. B (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Inthe Armed Forces Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 2008, (hereinafter referred to as the Principal Rules), (a) Rules 7 shall be re-numbered, as sub-rule (1) thereof and after sub-rule (1) of rules 7 as so re-numbered, the following sub-rule shall be inserted, namely :— *(2) — Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-rule (1), the application fee referred to in that sub- rule shall be payable only in respect of— () Original Application (OA); (i) Review Application (RA); (iify Contempt Application (CA); {iv) Application for restoration of Petition (MA); and (v) Application for transfer of case (from one Bench to another or from one court to another in the same Bench) (AT)”. 3. After rule 12 of the principal rules, the following sub-rule shall be inserted, namely : — “12A.—E’very application under rule 8 and the reply under rule 12 shall be supported by an affidavit of the person verifying the application or reply, as the case may be.” [F. No. 1(1)2011-D(AFT Cell)] ARUN KUMAR BAL,Jt. Secy.
